source: Curated from the approved experiment-loop skill after proposals 002/003/004/005/006/007/008/009 were applied.
description: Shareable package for the experiment-loop skill, including install scripts, templates, manifest schema reference, documentation, and completed worked examples.
notes: No private experiment artifacts, GIFs, Azure resources, credentials, or local user paths are included.
The worked examples include generated local artifacts so they can be inspected without rerunning.
The skill includes a human-review gate for durable changes to skills, rubrics, judge policy, and reusable instructions.
Ships references/validate_manifest.py (a blocking schema-conformance evidence gate) and scripts/skill_selftest.py (a regression self-test over shipped examples).

Ships scripts/check_viewer.py (an objective viewer gate: self-contained/embedded-JSON/JS-parse/link-integrity/a11y static checks, plus optional determinism and robustness checks) and scripts/navigate.mjs (a Playwright/Edge navigation harness for operating interactive viewers during navigation-based judging).
